verification.note: Reported by the WirelessJEPA authors (arXiv:2601.20190), NOT reproduced or re-run by this repo. Same dataset (RadioML 2016.10a, 11 classes, full SNR range -20..+18 dB) and evaluation protocol as our board's AMC track (docs/BIBLIOGRAPHY.md A.5). Paper's exact split indices are unpublished so sample-level overlap with our canonical split (amc-radioml2016-strat-snr-8010-seed42-v1) is not confirmed. No public weights; would require retraining the JEPA recipe to reproduce in-repo.
